title: StormWatchers
description: What would Minecraft be like with realistic weather and tornadoes without losing its original feel? Try this!
body:
## **StormWatchers: Emergency** has been released — go check it out [here](https://modrinth.com/project/wL7kgJnU)!ㅤ

![STORMWATCHERS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72d0decfda6609c617cbded7556d56186b22d769_0.webp)

**StormWatchers** is an atmospheric modpack that adds realistic weather while being lightweight and vanilla-plus.

![FEATURES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bc4810b2d97c45be3cd52d4e58a4944885730d4_0.webp)

✔️ Dynamic Weather Events with tornadoes, hurricanes, and more ( powered by Weather2 )

✔️ Lightweight and Vanilla-Friendly, with minimal impact on performance

✔️ Improved Exploration with new world generation ( William Wythers' Overhauled Overworld for 1.20.1 )

✔️ Immersive Soundscapes that enhance the stormy atmosphere

✔️ Integrated Shaders for enhanced visuals ( Optional )

![FOOTER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/747b3686f51fa1ec8c919ed557406a02e074444f_0.webp)
